steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '04.423.567/0001-21' AND REPORT_DATE = '2024-12-31' AND COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%ENEVA%' GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '04.423.567/0001-21' AND REPORT_DATE = '2024-12-31';"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Python computation for Eneva indicators (based on 2024-12-31 data)
assets_total = 96336659000.0
current_assets = 14579736000.0
cash = 5536316000.0
current_liabilities = 10520122000.0
short_debt = 3488839000.0
long_debt = 33598337000.0
# total debt (gross)
debt_bruta = short_debt + long_debt
# equity
patri_liq = 35152403000.0
# revenue and gross profit
receita_liquida = 21478400000.0
lucro_bruto = 7664633000.0
# expenses for selling and admin
despesas_vendas = 0.0
despesas_adm = 2169792000.0
# EBIT per definition
EBIT = lucro_bruto - despesas_vendas - despesas_adm
# depreciation/amortization
dep_amort = 3301374000.0
EBITDA = EBIT + dep_amort
# net income
lucro_liquido = 852904000.0
# outstanding shares
issued = 1932592000.0
treasury = 1202000.0
outstanding = issued - treasury
# price per share
preco = 12.47
# derived metrics
LPA = lucro_liquido / outstanding
VPA = patri_liq / outstanding
receita_por_acao = receita_liquida / outstanding
EBIT_por_acao = EBIT / outstanding
P_L = preco / LPA
P_VP = preco / VPA
P_EBIT = preco / EBIT_por_acao
PSR = preco / receita_por_acao
P_Ativos = preco / (assets_total / outstanding)
CapGiro = (current_assets - current_liabilities) / outstanding
P_CapGiro = preco / CapGiro
P_AtivCircLiq = preco / (current_assets - current_liabilities) / (1) / 1 # placeholder
# EV parameters
market_cap = preco * outstanding
net_debt = debt_bruta - cash
EV = market_cap + net_debt
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT
MargBruta = lucro_bruto / receita_liquida
MargEBIT = EBIT / receita_liquida
MargLiquida = lucro_liquido / receita_liquida
EBIT_por_ativo = EBIT / assets_total
ROIC = EBIT / (assets_total - 0 - cash)  # approximate (fornecedores not subtracted)
ROE = lucro_liquido / patri_liq
liquidez_corr = (current_assets - current_liabilities) / current_liabilities
DivBrPatrim = debt_bruta / patri_liq
GiroAtivos = receita_liquida / assets_total
print({
    'LPA': LPA,
    'VPA': VPA,
    'P/L': P_L,
    'P/VP': P_VP,
    'P/EBIT': P_EBIT,
    'PSR': PSR,
    'P/Ativos': P_Ativos,
    'P/Cap.Giro': P_CapGiro,
    'EV / EBITDA': EV_EBITDA,
    'EV / EBIT': EV_EBIT,
    'MargBruta': MargBruta,
    'MargEBIT': MargEBIT,
    'MargLiquida': MargLiquida,
    'EBIT / Ativo': EBIT_por_ativo,
    'ROIC': ROIC,
    'ROE': ROE,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': DivBrPatrim,
    'Giro Ativos': GiroAtivos
})
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
